Notice Of Motion To Intervene
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

[PROPOSED] INTERVENOR COAST NATIONAL INSURANCE's Motion To Intervene is GRANTED. Coast has shown good cause for leave to intervene to protect its own interests per Insurance Code 11580. Plaintiff Lorena Landeros has not shown that she will suffer any legal prejudice if Coast is permitted to intervene. Coast must file its complaint in intervention no later than April 20, 2018.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.

Order signed after hearing.
